x.title: We posted for twenty years, thinking we were talking to each other. Then the transformer came online, and the network re
x.summary: We posted for twenty years, thinking we were talking to each other. Then the transformer came online, and the network read what we’d written, and became itself.
x.author: amasad

x.title:

x.summary:
We built the Codex App with models that were okayish at front-end.

Wait to see what we can do when we finally improve front-end capabilities significantly in our models. That day will be something.
x.author: thsottiaux
